calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Vacated

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for judgment on the pleadings" is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Set For Trial On Feb-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order Tht Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion is granted. The truth of all specified facts in the Request for Admissions, Set One, propounded by plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A. on defendant DENISE M MELONE by mail on May 16, 2022, are deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
